statement: TSMC's CoWoS advanced packaging is fully booked through 2026 with lead times of 52 to 78 weeks, described by TSMC's CEO as exceptionally limited.
why: Fully-booked packaging with 52-78 week lead times confirms a hard advanced-packaging supply ceiling constraining AI-accelerator output through 2026.

impact.mechanism: Long CoWoS lead times cap how quickly GPU and accelerator supply can grow regardless of demand.

evidence.excerpt: fully booked through 2026, with lead times varying from 52 to 78 weeks

confidence.basis: Single secondary source (Forbes); no primary filing.
